Source: bemap-services-v2/search/bemap-near-point.js

/**
 * BeNomad BeMap JavaScript API - NearPoint
 *
 * One POI in the array returned by `bemap.NearPoiSearch.nearPoi()`.
 *
 * Wire shape from the BeMap server (cross-checked against a real
 * `POST service/nearpoi/1.0` response):
 *
 *   {
 *     coordinate: { lon, lat },   // POI location
 *     distance:   long,           // straight-line distance from the search centre, in metres
 *     duration:   long,           // estimated travel duration for the active transport mode, in seconds
 *     type:       string,         // POI category code, e.g. "RESTAURANT" / "HOTEL_MOTEL" / "RENT_A_CAR" / "PHARMACY" / ...
 *     name:       string,         // POI display name (may be empty for unnamed POIs like parking areas)
 *     telephone:  string          // POI phone number when known (may be empty)
 *   }
 *
 * @since 1.5.0
 * @public
 * @constructor
 * @param {Object} [options]
 * @param {bemap.Coordinate} [options.coordinate]
 * @param {Number} [options.distance]    Metres.
 * @param {Number} [options.duration]    Seconds.
 * @param {String} [options.type]        Server category code.
 * @param {String} [options.name]
 * @param {String} [options.telephone]
 * @param {String} [options.id]          Convenience; not emitted by the server.
 * @param {bemap.PostalAddress} [options.postalAddress] Reserved for future server fields.
 * @param {Object} [options.extra]
 */
bemap.NearPoint = function(options) {
    var opts = options || {};
    this.coordinate = opts.coordinate || null;
    this.distance = (typeof opts.distance === 'number') ? opts.distance : null;
    this.duration = (typeof opts.duration === 'number') ? opts.duration : null;
    this.type = opts.type || null;
    // name / telephone use a type-check rather than `||` so the server's
    // empty-string values (parking areas, partial records) survive.
    this.name = (typeof opts.name === 'string') ? opts.name : null;
    this.telephone = (typeof opts.telephone === 'string') ? opts.telephone : null;
    this.id = opts.id || null;
    this.postalAddress = opts.postalAddress || null;
    this.extra = opts.extra || null;
};

bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getCoordinate = function() { return this.coordinate; };
/** @public — metres. */
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getDistance = function() { return this.distance; };
/** @public — seconds for the active transport mode. */
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getDuration = function() { return this.duration; };
/** @public — server category code, e.g. "RESTAURANT", "HOTEL_MOTEL". */
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getType = function() { return this.type; };
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getName = function() { return this.name; };
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getTelephone = function() { return this.telephone; };
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getId = function() { return this.id; };
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getPostalAddress = function() { return this.postalAddress; };
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getExtra = function() { return this.extra; };

/* Compatibility aliases — earlier drafts used `category` / `poiClass`. */
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getCategory = function() { return this.type; };
bemap.NearPoint.prototype.getPoiClass = function() { return this.type; };

bemap.NearPoint.fromJson = function(raw) {
    if (!raw) return new bemap.NearPoint();

    var coord = null;
    if (raw.coordinate) {
        var lon = (raw.coordinate.lon !== undefined)
            ? raw.coordinate.lon
            : (raw.coordinate.longitude !== undefined) ? raw.coordinate.longitude : null;
        var lat = (raw.coordinate.lat !== undefined)
            ? raw.coordinate.lat
            : (raw.coordinate.latitude !== undefined) ? raw.coordinate.latitude : null;
        if (lon !== null && lat !== null) coord = new bemap.Coordinate(lon, lat);
    }

    var postal = null;
    if (raw.postalAddress) {
        postal = new bemap.PostalAddress({
            countryCode: raw.postalAddress.countryCode,
            country: raw.postalAddress.country,
            state: raw.postalAddress.state,
            county: raw.postalAddress.county,
            city: raw.postalAddress.city,
            district: raw.postalAddress.district,
            postalCode: raw.postalAddress.postalCode,
            street: raw.postalAddress.street,
            streetNumber: raw.postalAddress.streetNumber
        });
    }

    return new bemap.NearPoint({
        coordinate: coord,
        distance: (typeof raw.distance === 'number') ? raw.distance : null,
        duration: (typeof raw.duration === 'number') ? raw.duration : null,
        type: raw.type || raw.poiClass || raw['class'] || raw.category || null,
        name: (typeof raw.name === 'string') ? raw.name : null,
        telephone: (typeof raw.telephone === 'string') ? raw.telephone : null,
        id: raw.id || null,
        postalAddress: postal,
        extra: raw.extra || null
    });
};
